title: Galactic traders
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
The '''Galactic traders''' were a Guild in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Some of the Galactic [[Merchant/Legends|traders]] were sympathetic to the [[Independent Systems]], such as [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] because of the restrictions the Empire placed on their operations. They had a base on [[Norton Three]], in the [[Norton Asteroid Belt]] of the [[Aquilaean system]]. [[Trade frigate]]s were operated by the traders. They were overseen by the Imperial [[Ministry of Transport]].

Galactic traders wore distinctive clothing involving the use of [[Gold/Legends|gold]] and [[Hair/Legends|furs]].

[[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]], a trader, was also a spy for Aquilae. Another trader was [[Aay Zavos]], who had contacts with the [[Chrome Companies]] on [[Ophuchi]]. When the Empire announced plans for the annexation of Aquilae, all trade frigates were grounded at [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].
